headline.purpose: Reader section headings and restaurant names.

title.purpose: Recommendation titles and admin panel headings.

label.purpose: Sentence-case controls, metadata, chips, and fields.

data.purpose: Dates, times, prices, scores, and operational counts.

shadows.name: structural-low
shadows.purpose: Temporary overlap, sticky controls, or a compact floating toolbar only.

motion.name: state-out
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, selected, and content-state transitions.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Small active-state compression without layout movement.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single strongest action in a task region.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 46px; padding: 11px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--olive, #334c39); color: #fffaf1; font: 720 0.8rem/1.3 Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: #343a31; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent, #e25a31); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-button-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-button-primary:disabled { color: #fffaf1; background: #687064; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A clear alternative action without competing with the primary route.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { min-height: 46px; padding: 11px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.14); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--paper, #fffdf8); color: var(--ink, #20261d); font: 720 0.8rem/1.3 Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-button-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.28); background: #fff; } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent, #e25a31); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-button-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: A familiar high-contrast field for operational input.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--ink, #20261d); font: 720 0.8rem/1.3 Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height: 48px; padding: 11px 13px; border: 1px solid rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.24); border-radius: 12px; background: #fff; color: var(--ink, #20261d); font: 400 1rem/1.55 Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: var(--muted, #687064); opacity: 1; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--accent, #e25a31); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(226, 90, 49, 0.16); } .ds-field input:disabled { border-color: rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.14); background: #f4efe5; color: #687064; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Date Wayfinder
components.description: The primary date-orientation control for the reader flow.
components.html: Valittu päiväTorstai 16. heinäkuuta
components.css: .ds-date-wayfinder { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr 46px; gap: 8px; align-items: center; min-height: 62px; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.14); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--paper, #fffdf8); color: var(--ink, #20261d); font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-date-wayfinder > div { display: grid; gap: 2px; text-align: center; } .ds-date-wayfinder span { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 720; } .ds-date-wayfinder strong { font-size: 1rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-date-wayfinder button { width: 46px; height: 46px; padding: 0; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-date-wayfinder button:hover { border-color: rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.14); background: #f4efe5; } .ds-date-wayfinder button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent, #e25a31); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-date-wayfinder button:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Information Chip
components.description: A compact factual label for time, price, diet, or status.
components.css: .ds-information-chip { display: inline-flex; min-height: 30px; align-items: center; padding: 5px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.14); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--cream, #f4efe5); color: var(--ink, #20261d); font: 720 0.8rem/1.3 Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Leading Recommendation
components.description: The single visual anchor for today's strongest lunch choice.
components.html:
1. paras valinta

Vinola

Kuha ja raikas lisuke tekevät tästä päivän kiinnostavimman lounaan.

Katso viikon ruokalista →
components.css: .ds-leading-recommendation { display: grid; gap: 12px; padding: 24px; border: 0; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--olive, #334c39); color: #fffaf1; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-leading-recommendation-rank { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 720; } .ds-leading-recommendation h3 { margin: 4px 0 0; font: 600 2rem/1.05 Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .ds-leading-recommendation p { max-width: 52ch; margin: 0; color: #fffaf1; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-leading-recommendation a { width: fit-content; min-height: 46px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; color: #fffaf1; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 720; text-underline-offset: 4px; } .ds-leading-recommendation a:hover { text-decoration-thickness: 2px; } .ds-leading-recommendation a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #fffaf1; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Menu Reading Row
components.description: A calm, aligned alternative to an identical marketplace card grid.
components.css: .ds-menu-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(10rem, 0.7fr); gap: 18px; align-items: start; padding: 18px 0; border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(32, 38, 29, 0.14); background: transparent; color: var(--ink, #20261d); font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-menu-row h3 { margin: 0 0 4px; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-menu-row p { margin: 0; color: #687064; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-menu-row-facts { display: grid; gap: 6px; justify-items: end; text-align: right; } .ds-menu-row-facts span { font-size: 0.8rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-menu-row-facts strong { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.4; } @media (max-width: 600px) { .ds-menu-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px; } .ds-menu-row-facts { justify-items: start; text-align: left; } }

components.name: Status Strip
components.description: A full-border status treatment that never relies on a colored side stripe.
components.html: Viimeisin päivitysyritys epäonnistui.Näytämme viimeksi onnistuneesti haetut tiedot.
components.css: .ds-status-strip { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 18px; align-items: baseline; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(174, 103, 27, 0.24); border-radius: 12px; background: #fff1d8; color: #6e4620; font: 400 0.88rem/1.45 Aptos, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-status-strip strong { font-weight: 760; }

narrative.overview:
Keskipäivän opaste treats the interface like a well-designed local wayfinding system at noon: crisp, direct, grounded, and high-signal. It preserves the established clay, green, and neutral identity, but every visual decision must help a Finnish-speaking reader choose lunch in under a minute.

The reader surface is mobile-first and composed for fast scanning: the current date, the leading recommendation, its rationale, and the path to the full offering must be obvious without study. Desktop adds breadth, not a different hierarchy. The admin surface uses the same palette and components at a denser rhythm, with the editorial serif removed from operational labels, controls, and data.

This system explicitly rejects the food-delivery marketplace, the generic SaaS dashboard, and the “AI-powered” novelty product. Recommendations earn trust through visible criteria, sources, freshness, and honest states; the underlying AI stays backstage.
keyCharacteristics: Near-flat hierarchy built from solid fills, full borders, alignment, and whitespace.
Signal Clay appears rarely as an orientation cue; Route Green carries primary action and the leading choice.
Touch targets are at least 46px, with compact facts and calm reading density around them.
Public decision headlines may use Georgia; every task-oriented label, control, and data point uses Aptos or Segoe UI.
Mobile exposes the decision first; desktop increases comparison capacity without adding decoration.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Clay occupies no more than 10% of a screen. Its rarity is what makes it useful.

rules.name: The Route Green Action Rule
rules.body: Route Green is reserved for primary action, the first recommendation, and active wayfinding. Inactive states never borrow its saturation.

rules.name: The Clear Surface Rule
rules.body: Field Ground is the canvas and Clear Surface is the reading layer. Never stack cream-on-cream cards to manufacture hierarchy.

rules.name: The Serif Boundary Rule
rules.body: Georgia is permitted for public decision headlines and restaurant storytelling only. It is forbidden in buttons, chips, field labels, admin controls, tables, status messages, and operational data.

rules.name: The No Eyebrow Scaffold Rule
rules.body: Repeated tiny uppercase tracked labels are prohibited. Use one plain sentence-case context label when orientation genuinely requires it.

rules.name: The Flat Map Rule
rules.body: If a surface can be understood through alignment, fill, or a divider, it gets no shadow.

rules.name: The One Decision Rule
rules.body: The current date and leading recommendation must be identifiable in the first mobile viewport without relying on animation.

dos: Do make the current date and leading recommendation identifiable in the first 390 × 844 viewport.
Do keep interactive targets at least 46px high and preserve visible keyboard focus.
Do use Route Green for primary action and Signal Clay only for rare orientation and state cues.
Do show ranking criteria, source, freshness, and stale or unavailable states in plain Finnish.
Do use full dividers, alignment, and 18–24px internal spacing before introducing another container.
Do keep long rationales and operational prose within 70ch.
Do use text or an icon alongside color for warning, danger, success, and selected states.
donts: Don't resemble a food-delivery marketplace with equally promoted restaurant tiles, promotional imagery, or ordering affordances.
Don't resemble a generic SaaS dashboard with interchangeable stat cards, decorative charts, or a sidebar that does not serve a real task.
Don't resemble an “AI-powered” novelty product with gradients, glows, bot motifs, or implementation-first copy.
Don't use repeated tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows as section scaffolding.
Don't use 20–28px card radii, nested cards, or identical card grids as the default structure.
Don't combine a 1px border with the current broad 32px-blur shadow on the same resting surface.
Don't use a colored border-left or border-right thicker than 1px for notices; use a full border, state fill, icon, or leading text.
Don't use Signal Clay for small text on Field Ground or Clear Surface.
Don't add glassmorphism, gradient text, decorative grids, or motion that does not communicate state.
